pi_items.source: Task specification in task.json and export_result.sh script. This is the standard output file path used across all task auditing.

pi_items.verified_value: ["Friends", "Settings", "Crew Chat"] - Notifications is accessible but NOT a top-level menu item
pi_items.source: Web search and document analysis of Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView) help documentation. Official app documentation at help.flightcrewview.com confirms Friends, Settings, and Crew Chat are separate top-level menu items accessible via 'app menu > [item]'. Notifications is configurable within Settings or device Settings, not as a separate top-level menu item. References: https://help.flightcrewview.com/support/solutions/articles/16000113255-friends-info-troubleshooting, https://help.flightcrewview.com/support/solutions/articles/16000166834-crew-chat-info-troubleshooting, https://help.flightcrewview.com/support/solutions/articles/16000181669-notifications-alerts-troubleshooting

pi_items.verified_value: 8 or more top-level menu items: Friends, Settings, Crew Chat, History, Home/Schedule, Hotel/Airport Lookup, Contact Developer, Subscription info
pi_items.source: Web search of Flight Crew View help documentation and feature pages. Multiple sources confirm the presence of these menu items: (1) Friends - help.flightcrewview.com/...friends-info, (2) Settings - mentioned in multiple articles, (3) Crew Chat - help.flightcrewview.com/.../crew-chat, (4) History - help.flightcrewview.com/.../history-info, (5) Hotel/Airport Lookup - flightcrewview.com features page, (6) Contact Developer - help documentation, (7) Subscription info - help documentation. The actual top-level count is at least 8, not 4.

privileged_info_summary: Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView) is a real, production Android/iOS application for pilots and flight attendants, not synthetic data. The app's main navigation menu includes at least 8 top-level items: Friends, Settings, Crew Chat, History, Home/Schedule, Hotel/Airport Lookup, Contact Developer, and Subscription info. The required items list is partially correct: Friends, Settings, and Crew Chat are confirmed top-level menu items accessible via 'app menu > [item]'. However, Notifications is not a separate top-level menu item but rather a feature configurable within Settings or through device system settings. The minimum item count of 4 is substantially lower than the actual menu count of 8+.
